Meet Your Doctor

Dr. Rao Muhammad Tariq Aslam

A highly qualified and experienced ophthalmologist serving the people of Lodhran and surrounding areas. Dr. Aslam combines clinical excellence with genuine compassion — ensuring every patient receives a clear diagnosis, honest advice, and world-class treatment.

  • Specialist in Laser Eye Surgery
  • Cataract & Retina Expert
  • Modern Diagnostic Equipment
  • Wheelchair Accessible Facility
Book an Appointment

What We Offer

Our Eye Care Services

Laser Eye Treatment

State-of-the-art LASIK and laser refractive surgery to permanently correct your vision. Minimal downtime, maximum clarity.

Comprehensive Eye Exam

Thorough examination using modern diagnostic technology. Covering vision, retina, pressure, and full ocular health assessment.

Specialist Consultation

One-on-one consultation with Dr. Aslam for cataracts, glaucoma, diabetic eye disease, and all complex eye conditions.

Surgical Procedures

Cataract surgery and advanced ophthalmic procedures in a fully equipped, sterile operating theatre.
